column1: # One scenario per row. Tab-separated. Lines starting with # are comments.
#   scenario  — short id (used for baseline directory name and cache filenames)
#   logfile   — path relative to repo root
#   options   — ltl options (excluding --disable-progress and -o; the cache
#               helper appends -o <logfile> itself when invoking ltl)
# Decision 6 matrix: 4 golden log files x 4 option families = 16 scenarios.
#   default          baseline raw-array data model on both observed surfaces
#   consolidated     -g 90 changes which samples land in which message bucket
#   bin-data-model   bin-counter data model on both surfaces (falls back to raw today)
#   sorted-by-p999   ranks output by p999 (exercises percentile-based ranking)
# All scenarios pin -mdm and -bdm explicitly (#266 selectors) so the harness
# Apache HTTP2 scenarios prepend -du us because its access log records duration
# in microseconds and auto-detection cannot infer this. Without -du us every
